index.title: Portal
index.description: St. Expedite Press portal — books, about, donations, submissions, lab, services, and store.

books.title: Books
books.description: Books, current publications, and oncoming projects from St. Expedite Press.
books.subtitle: Publications and current program
books.introText: SEXP publishes original fiction and novella. The Library of the Southern Civilization recovers Southern reprints and archival work. The translation series brings Spanish, French, and Russian works into English.

about.title: About
about.description: About St. Expedite Press, with general contact and updates signup.
about.subtitle: About and general correspondence

donate.title: Donate
donate.description: One-time donations to support St. Expedite Press through Stripe-hosted checkout.
donate.subtitle: Support the press
donate.introTitle: This work continues because of this.
donate.introText: A one-time contribution enters the ongoing work of publication, archive, and continuity.

donateThanks.title: Donation Complete
donateThanks.description: Donation confirmation for St. Expedite Press.
donateThanks.subtitle: Support received

submit.title: Submission
submit.description: Submission inquiries for St. Expedite Press, with confirmation and email fallback.
submit.subtitle: Manuscript and project inquiries
submit.introText: Send the project note first. If files are needed, attach them by replying to the reference email.

lab.title: Lab
lab.description: Interactive experiments and ongoing instruments, including the American Anglossic Compass.
lab.subtitle: Experimental instruments
lab.introTitle: The Lab runs things that don't belong in the catalog yet.
lab.introText: The American Anglossic Compass is the current instrument — a scored sequence of interpretive prompts that resolves into a placement.

gallery.title: Store
gallery.description: Books, prints, and objects from St. Expedite Press — inventory loaded live from the shop.
gallery.subtitle: Books, prints, and objects
gallery.introText: Live inventory from the press shop. Checkout handled directly.

services.title: Services
services.description: Advisory, editorial, and decision-intelligence services offered through St. Expedite Press.
services.subtitle: Advisory and editorial work
services.introTitle: Selected engagements for institutions that need careful judgment.
services.introText: A small number of external engagements, taken selectively. The same editorial discipline behind our catalog: formal precision, long-horizon thinking, and resistance to the convenient.
